'''babuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideworker|hideworker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideworker|hideworker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| babuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæbichith|bæbichith]] || [[word:bæbichij|bæbichij]] || [[word:bæbichish|bæbichish]] || [[word:bæbichi|bæbichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:babubuchuth|babubuchuth]] || [[word:babubuchuj|babubuchuj]] || [[word:babubuchush|babubuchush]] || [[word:babubuchu|babubuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:babuchuth|babuchuth]] || [[word:babuchuj|babuchuj]] || [[word:babuchush|babuchush]] || [[word:babuchu|babuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:babufchuth|babufchuth]] || [[word:babufchuj|babufchuj]] || [[word:babufchush|babufchush]] || [[word:babufchuf|babufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:babuchuthu|babuchuthu]] || [[word:babuchuju|babuchuju]] || [[word:babuchushu|babuchushu]] || [[word:babuchuku|babuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:babuchuth|babuchuth]] || [[word:babuchuj|babuchuj]] || [[word:babuchush|babuchush]] || [[word:babuchu|babuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:babuchuthul|babuchuthul]] || [[word:babuchujul|babuchujul]] || [[word:babuchushul|babuchushul]] || [[word:babuchukul|babuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:babuchuthuthu|babuchuthuthu]] || [[word:babuchujuju|babuchujuju]] || [[word:babuchushushu|babuchushushu]] || [[word:babuchuku|babuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:babuchuthun|babuchuthun]] || [[word:babuchujun|babuchujun]] || [[word:babuchushun|babuchushun]] || [[word:babuchukun|babuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:babuchuthuoro|babuchuthuoro]] || [[word:babuchujuoro|babuchujuoro]] || [[word:babuchushuoro|babuchushuoro]] || [[word:babuchukuoro|babuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
